news.summary: In Rye, New York on May 14, 2025, The Gabelli Convertible and Income Securities Fund Inc. (NYSE:GCV) announced a cash distribution of $0.12 per share. This distribution is set to be paid out on June 23, 2025, to common stock shareholders who are recorded as such by June 13, 2025.
news.headline: Gabelli Convertible and Income Securities Fund (NYSE: GCV) declares $0.12 per share distribution on May 14, payable June 23 to shareholders.

news.summary: During the Combined Shareholders’ General Meeting held on May 14, 2025, all the proposed resolutions put forth by COFACE SA were approved by the attendees.
news.headline: COFACE SA had its shareholders' meeting on May 14, 2025, where all proposed resolutions were approved.

news.summary: In a recent update, it was revealed that only 40% of employers are meeting the necessary standards for certification, and WebMD Health Services has joined this elite group that is excelling in workplace mental health. The company has been honored with the prestigious 2025 Platinum Bell Seal by Mental Health America, showcasing their commitment to prioritizing mental health in the workplace. This recognition marks WebMD Health Services as a standout in this area, emphasizing their dedication to fostering a mentally healthy work environment.
news.headline: WebMD HS awarded Mental Health America Platinum Bell Seal for Workplace MH, joining 2 in 5 employers.

news.summary: The 15th Annual Globee® Awards for Business, honoring achievements in every industry, location, and company size, are now accepting entries. These prestigious awards, organized by Globee®, recognize excellence in the business world on a global scale. Submit your entries now to be considered for this esteemed recognition.
news.headline: 15th Annual Globee® Awards for Business open for entries, recognizing achievements across industries.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, a strategic partnership has been revealed between BlocPal, a prominent digital wealth and banking ecosystem provider, and Mobilum, an inventive payment infrastructure and compliance solutions company. The collaboration aims to integrate Mobilum's worldwide payment processing and compliance solutions into BlocPal's ecosystem. This move is set to greatly improve BlocPal's capacity in enabling smooth crypto transactions and strong payment processing globally.
news.headline: BlocPal and Mobilum partner to enhance global payment and digital asset capabilities, integrating Mobilum's solutions into BlocPal's ecosystem.

news.summary: In South San Francisco, California, Circle Pharma revealed that its Trials in Progress abstract has been chosen for a poster presentation at the 2025 American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting in Chicago. This clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focuses on macrocycle therapeutics for challenging cancers. The Phase 1 study for CID-078 (NCT06577987), a novel treatment, will be featured in the poster, highlighting the trial's design and current advancements. The ASCO event is scheduled to occur from May 30 to June 3.
news.headline: Circle Pharma will present Trials in Progress poster on CID-078, a Cyclin A/B Inhibitor, at ASCO 2025. Phase 1 study ongoing (NCT06577987).

news.summary: Siemens has revealed at Automate 2025 in Detroit an extension of its industrial AI solutions, introducing advanced AI agents to complement its existing Industrial Copilot ecosystem. This development marks a significant change from conventional AI assistants, transitioning towards autonomous agents capable of independently managing complete processes with no human involvement. The novel AI agent architecture by Siemens signifies a move towards more sophisticated AI technologies in the industrial sector.
news.headline: Siemens unveils AI agents for automation at Automate 2025 in Detroit. Shift towards autonomous agents.

news.summary: A recent trade agreement between the United States and China will result in a temporary reduction of tariffs by 100%, leading to a significant increase in the S&P 500 on Monday. This development has brought about positive outcomes for the market. However, there are still potential risks to be considered despite the surge in the index.
news.headline: U.S-China trade deal reduces tariffs by over 100%, S&P 500 rises, risks persist.

news.summary: On May 12, 2025, OTC Markets Group Inc. revealed that Northisle Copper and Gold Inc., a Vancouver sustainable mineral resource company, will now trade on the OTCQX® Best Market under the tickers TSX-V: NCX and OTCQX: NTCPF. OTC Markets Group Inc. operates markets for trading around 12,000 U.S. and international securities. This upgrade allows Northisle Copper and Gold Inc. to move from the Pink® market to the OTCQX, a significant advancement for the company.
news.headline: OTC Markets Group welcomes Northisle Copper and Gold Inc. to OTCQX, upgraded from Pink market.

news.summary: Polestar Automotive Holding, listed on NASDAQ under PSNY, experienced a decrease in its stock pricing today despite announcing an impressive 84.2% year-over-year rise in first-quarter revenue, amounting to $608 million. The revenue surge was fueled by heightened sales volumes and a favorable shift in the product mix. Retail sales climbed by 76.4% year over year, reaching 12,304 cars in the quarter, with the growth attributed to the growing popularity of newer models. Additionally, the company managed to expand its gross margin by 14.5 percentage points year over year. In a recent development, Polestar secured a new financing deal worth $450 million to further foster its expansion plans. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Polestar's Q1 revenue jumps 84.2% Y/Y to $608 million, retail sales up 76.4% Y/Y to 12,304 cars, gross margin expands 14.5 ppts.

news.summary: In London, Granola has unveiled Granola 2.0, an updated version of their AI-powered notepad that merges typed notes with AI transcriptions. The new release transitions the AI meeting assistant into a robust workspace for teams. Granola processes and scrutinizes millions of minutes of discussions each day, generating valuable collective insights that can be utilized by entire organizations. Following its launch a year ago, Granola has garnered significant attention from users.
news.headline: Granola unveils Granola 2.0, an AI workspace for teams, and secures $43M Series B funding.

news.summary: The United States and China have agreed to significantly reduce their retaliatory tariffs in a move to de-escalate their trade war, bringing down U.S. tariffs on Chinese goods from 145% to 30% and Chinese tariffs on U.S. goods from 125% to 10%. This agreement, reached in Geneva with high-level negotiations led by U.S. Treasury Secretary and China's Vice Premier, establishes a 90-day reset starting May 14. The decision follows President Trump's aggressive trade tariffs launched on April 2, aimed at achieving balanced trade. This tariff truce not only provides diplomatic relief but also aims to prevent a U.S. economic slowdown and inflation concerns by eliminating uncertainties that were affecting business and consumer confidence. The market forecasts show a decline in U.S. recession probabilities from 60% to 46% this year due to these tariff reductions.
news.headline: US and China agree to cut retaliatory tariffs by over 100%, establishing a 90-day truce. U.S. tariffs on Chinese goods drop from 145% to 30%, and Chinese tariffs on U.S. goods from 125% to 10%. This decision comes after high-level negotiations led by U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and China's Vice Premier He Lifeng in Geneva. The truce eases recession and inflation risks, with a significant positive impact on global trade. Chance of a U.S. recession this year drops from 60% to 46%.

news.summary: In anticipation of the June launch, the robotaxi service is on track to be introduced to the public. As investors eagerly await this milestone, the question arises: Is Tesla Stock a viable investment leading up to the anticipated launch of the robotaxi service?
news.headline: Investors anticipate Tesla's robotaxi launch in June, speculating on stock buy/sell strategies.

news.summary: Following the successful negotiation of a trade agreement between President Trump and China, the Dow Jones experienced a significant surge of 1,000 points. This positive development resulted in rallying performances from prominent companies such as Apple, Nvidia, and Tesla. The market responded favorably to the news, marking a notable upturn in investor confidence and stock values.
news.headline: Dow Jones jumps 1,000 points post Trump-China trade deal, Apple, Nvidia, Tesla surge.

news.summary: The trade war initiated by President Donald Trump is causing concern among the elite members of Wall Street. However, individuals closely connected to the administration see signs of progress in bilateral trade negotiations, offering a glimmer of hope amidst the anxiety.
news.headline: China trade talks showing progress amid uncertainties, generating optimism for administration tied players.

news.summary: One hundred and fifty people were reported missing following the natural disaster that struck the region last night. Emergency responders are currently searching for survivors, with over fifty individuals rescued so far. The local government has allocated ten million dollars for relief efforts and is urging residents to evacuate to designated shelters for their safety. The disaster was caused by heavy rainfall, resulting in widespread flooding and landslides throughout the area. Authorities are warning residents to stay indoors and avoid flooded areas to prevent further casualties.
news.headline: US and China agree to halt increases in tariffs on each other's goods. Tariffs remain at 25% on $250 billion of Chinese imports.

news.headline: Bancroft Fund Ltd. to distribute $0.32 per share to common shareholders on June 23, 2025, record date is June 13, 2025.

news.summary: Kohl's Corporation recently conducted its 2025 Annual Meeting of Shareholders in Menomonee Falls, Wisconsin. Shareholders voted on four proposals, resulting in the election of Wendy Arlin, Michael J. Bender, Yael Cosset, H. Charles Floyd, Robbin Mitchell, Jonas Prising, John E. Schlifske, and Adolfo Villagomez to the Board of Directors. Each director will serve a one-year term or until their successors are elected. Kohl's Corporation is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol KSS.
news.headline: Kohl’s Corp held 2025 shareholder meeting, electing 8 directors for a one-year term.

news.summary: Fast-food chain Carl's Jr. has introduced a new promotional campaign that gives customers more control over their dining experience. The campaign began on May 14, 2025, in Franklin, Tennessee, and features social media influencer Alix Earle. Late-night cravings are a common occurrence after a night out, and Carl's Jr. aims to cater to these desires with their latest offering. The partnership with Alix Earle is expected to boost the promotion's visibility and engagement levels. Stay tuned for more updates on how Carl's Jr. is revolutionizing the dining experience.
news.headline: Carl's Jr.® launches Build Your Own Bag promotion, featuring social media influencer Alix Earle; aims to cater to late-night cravings.

news.summary: In Seattle today, Expedia Group revealed a significant enhancement to its B2B technology platform, introducing fresh APIs and advertising advancements aimed at boosting partner expansion and enhancing traveler interaction. The company is broadening its capabilities with innovative GenAI-driven discovery encounters, debuting with Expedia® Trip Matching, a unique functionality that transforms Instagram reels into tailored travel suggestions. Furthermore, through the recent launch of its new platform, the company is focusing on.
news.headline: Expedia Group enhances B2B platform with new APIs and GenAI partnerships for smarter travel discovery. Expands with GenAI-powered Expedia Trip Matching feature on Instagram.

news.summary: A recent report on the Australia Social Commerce Market projects significant growth in the sector. The market is forecasted to increase by 19.8% annually, reaching a value of US$3.76 billion by 2025. This growth is attributed to the strong performance of the social commerce market in the country. The report provides detailed insights and analysis on various key performance indicators (KPIs) related to social commerce trends, end-use sectors, operational metrics, retail product dynamics, and consumer demographics. This updated data book offers valuable information for businesses and stakeholders interested in the Australian social commerce market.
news.headline: Australia's social commerce market expected to reach $3.76 billion in 2025, growing by 19.8% annually, aiming for $8.58 billion by 2030.

news.summary: SeRo Systems, based in Frankfurt, Germany, has developed a cutting-edge real-time system that provides live monitoring of air traffic. This innovative solution not only detects and identifies GPS jamming and spoofing but also monitors such incidents as they occur. The system is AI-supported and can even predict short-term occurrences of GNSS issues for aircraft. This groundbreaking technology is set to revolutionize air traffic monitoring and safety measures.
news.headline: SeRo Systems launches real-time GNSS RFI display detecting jamming/spoofing, with AI predictive alerts. - 108 characters

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, MTX Group Inc., a worldwide technology consulting firm, revealed its acquisition of Stralto, Inc., a company specializing in technology solutions for government agencies and possessing extensive knowledge in Microsoft platforms. This acquisition is expected to greatly enhance MTX's capacity to provide comprehensive tech services.
news.headline: MTX Group Inc. purchases Stralto, Inc. to enhance Microsoft capabilities in the public sector.

news.summary: Angel Oak Capital Advisors has successfully finalized its inaugural securitization of Home Equity Line of Credit (HELOC), indicating its sixth issuance of the year 2025. This achievement has propelled its total issuance to an impressive $22 billion.
news.headline: Angel Oak Capital Advisors debuts first HELOC securitization, 6th in 2025, exceeding $22B total issuance. Investors show strong interest.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, in San Mateo, California, Rakuten Rewards, a prominent Cash Back shopping platform, announced the appointment of Wendy Bergh as their new Chief Marketing Officer (CMO). Bergh comes with a strong background in marketing leadership within rapidly expanding e-commerce and technology firms.
news.headline: Rakuten Rewards appoints Wendy Bergh as CMO, with extensive experience in e-commerce and technology companies.

news.summary: Niagara Falls in Ontario will be hosting a significant event called "The Border Brawl" where U.S. President Trump and Canadian Prime Minister Carney are invited to attend. This mega-event by Zone·ify aims to showcase diplomacy in a unique setting.
news.headline: US President Trump and Canadian PM Carney invited ringside at "The Border Brawl" mega-event in Ontario; Diplomacy taps out.

news.summary: In Fornebu, Norway on May 14, 2025, Aker Carbon Capture ASA (ACC) made a stock exchange announcement about selling their 20% ownership stake in SLB Capturi to Aker ASA on May 9, 2025. This transaction was significant for ACC and marked an important development in their strategic partnership with Aker ASA.
news.headline: Aker Carbon Capture ASA to pay cash dividend after selling 20% ownership in SLB Capturi to Aker ASA.

news.summary: In Grinnell, Iowa, a ribbon cutting ceremony for the new Empowerment Command Center and Affordable Housing Project will be held on May 21, 2025, at 11:00 am. The event, organized by Central Iowa Shelter & Services (CISS) and Iowa Total Care, will take place at 306 6th Ave. This initiative aims to address housing challenges and empower community members.
news.headline: CISS and Iowa Total Care open Empowerment Command Center and Affordable Housing Project in Grinnell on May 21 at 11:00 am.

news.summary: As of May 14, 2025, experts predict that the worldwide market for modular construction is set to expand significantly, with an estimated value of approximately USD 162.42 billion by the year 2030. This growth is expected to occur at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.9% between 2025 and 2030. The data comes from a recent study conducted by Grand View Research, Inc., citing factors like increasing demand for...
news.headline: Global modular construction market to hit $162.42B by 2030 at 7.9% CAGR - Grand View Research, Inc.

news.summary: Dickerson has been recognized for her achievements in the private equity sector, making it to PE Hub's 2025 "Women in Private Equity" list and receiving an honorable mention from Mergers & Acquisitions on its "2025 Most Influential Women in Private Equity M&A" list. The announcement was made in San Francisco on May 14, 2025. Genstar Capital, a prominent private equity firm, was mentioned in the news.
news.headline: Melissa Dickerson of Genstar Capital named to 2025 "Women in Private Equity" list on PE Hub and earned honorable mention on Mergers & Acquisitions "Most Influential Women in Private Equity M&A" list.

news.summary: In a recent development on May 14, 2025, CapitalSoft Inc. successfully completed the acquisition of assets previously managed by Laru Technologies, a well-known provider of fraud detection and risk management software for electronic bank transactions. The deal was facilitated by Viking Mergers & Acquisitions. CapitalSoft Inc., established in 2004, has taken over the assets to enhance its services in the financial sector. This acquisition marks a significant move for both companies and underscores the continuous evolution of the industry.
news.headline: CapitalSoft Inc. acquires Laru Technologies, trusted fraud detection provider, joining forces for ebpIQ venture. (Characters: 104)
